invalidation.zh: 价格跌破820（基于ATR 9.45和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至80%以上（显示轧多压力加剧），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 820 (based on ATR 9.45 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 80% (indicating increased long squeeze pressure).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破120（基于ATR 2.10和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至20%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 120 (based on ATR 2.10 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 20% (indicating short pressure easing).
